title: generated_files
description: Catalog of auto-generated files the builder must not hand-edit. repo-profiler populates by scanning for AUTO-GENERATED, DO NOT EDIT, @generated, openapi-generator, protoc, prisma generate, swagger-codegen markers. If regenerate_cmd is null, builder skips the file and records a mistake under builder:generated_file_blocked.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this catalog was generated

entries.description: List of auto-generated files found in the repo

path.description: Repo-relative path to the generated file

marker.description: The generator marker string found in the file header (e.g. AUTO-GENERATED, @generated)

regenerate_cmd.description: Shell command to regenerate the file; null if no known command (builder skips and records builder:generated_file_blocked)
